data.title: Former Congressman Sean Patrick Maloney named CEO of Coalition for Prediction Markets. Patrick McHenry is Senior Advisor. Washington, Jan. 13, 2026.
data.description: A bipartisan coalition called the Coalition for Prediction Markets (CPM) is gaining expertise from former Members of Congress in regulatory policy, financial markets, and consumer protection. Established on January 13, 2026, in Washington, the group aims to maintain fairness and transparency in their operations. This move is set to enhance the group's capabilities in various areas by utilizing the knowledge and experience of these former legislators. The CPM is focused on regulatory matters, financial market activities, and safeguarding consumer interests. This development signals a strategic initiative by the coalition to strengthen its foundation and effectiveness by incorporating the skills of these ex-Congress members.

data.title: NWEA report provides guidance for schools on handling weather-related disruptions. Includes natural disasters recovery playbook.
data.description: Utilizing insights from past crises, a new natural disasters recovery playbook has been unveiled by NWEA, a K-12 assessment and research organization based in Boston. Released on January 13, 2026, this playbook aims to assist schools in lessening the effects of disasters on education. The initiative is crucial as instances of extreme weather events are on the rise, emphasizing the need for proactive measures. By leveraging experiences from previous emergencies, this playbook offers strategies to enhance resilience and continuity in education. It serves as a vital resource to navigate challenges, with the ultimate goal of safeguarding teaching and learning environments.

data.title: US patent applications drop by 9%, reaching a record low after peak last year; 2025 shows focus on sustainability in R&D.
data.description: The 2025 rankings show a significant emphasis on sustainability in research and development (R&D). Among the top 10 fastest-growing technologies, half of the patent areas are related to batteries. Additionally, there is a notable focus on recovering usable material from waste. This information is based on an annual patent study conducted by IFI CLAIMS, headquartered in New Haven, Connecticut. The study signifies a shift towards environmentally friendly innovations with a prominent presence of sustainable practices in R&D.

data.title: Under political pressure, Trump aims to address increasing housing costs. White House mulls ideas for a housing affordability plan at upcoming economic conference.
data.description: Officials at the White House have been considering numerous strategies for the president to unveil a housing affordability plan at an upcoming economic conference.

data.title: Bari Weiss's CBS Evening News revamp faces scrutiny with Golden Globes mention, sparking controversy.
data.description: She is facing intense criticism for her redesign of the “CBS Evening News,” with even her own network using it as a joke during the Golden Globes on Sunday.

data.title: Italy’s CONSOB warns 'finfluencers' about ESMA's crypto risks, emphasizing compliance with EU rules on investment advice and advertising.
data.description: The securities regulator in Italy has recently released information regarding the ESMA's finfluencer factsheet. The regulator emphasized that EU regulations concerning investment recommendations and advertising also pertain to cryptocurrency. This serves as a warning to social media influencers who promote financial products online. It is crucial for individuals to abide by these rules to ensure compliance with the law.

data.title: Xinjiang's 15th Five-Year Plan (2026-30) aims to align with national modernization goals, focusing on reform and development.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in Beijing, a report from Xinjiang Today highlighted the region's upcoming 15th Five-Year Plan spanning from 2026 to 2030. This plan aims to align national modernization efforts with local goals for reform, development, and security in Xinjiang. The guidance for this plan was released during the Fourth Plenary session, emphasizing the synchronization of regional aspirations with the broader drive for advancement.

data.title: SEC chair Paul Atkins backs bipartisan bill for crypto market regulation to land on Trump’s desk this year.
data.description: The chair of the Securities and Exchange Commission, Paul Atkins, has expressed significant backing for bipartisan legislation that targets transitioning cryptocurrency markets away from a regulatory ambiguous area.

data.title: Husqvarna partners with British Masters on DP World Tour, signing multi-year deal, enhancing brand visibility in golf.
data.description: In Stockholm on January 13, 2026, it was announced that Husqvarna, a prominent company in robotic lawnmowing and a division of Husqvarna Group, has entered a multi-year deal to be the Title Partner of the British Masters, a prestigious golf tournament. This partnership marks a significant move in the sporting world as Husqvarna takes on this role in one of the oldest and most renowned golf events globally. The 2026 edition of the tournament will now be known as the Husqvarna British Masters, showcasing the company's commitment to the event.

data.title: TryHard Holdings Limited and Carnegie Hill Capital Partners team up to create a global entertainment investment fund.
data.description: Tryhard Holdings Limited has recently announced a significant collaboration with Carnegie Hill Capital Partners, entering into a binding agreement to establish a global entertainment investment fund. The partnership aims to leverage their combined expertise and resources to create new opportunities in the entertainment industry. The fund's initial capital is reported to be $100 million, signaling a strong commitment to investing in various entertainment ventures worldwide. This collaboration is expected to drive growth and innovation in the sector, with both companies excited about the prospects of this strategic partnership.

data.title: Delta receives double "A" rating from CDP for climate change and water security for the fifth time; less than 1% of 22,000+ participants achieve this.
data.description: Based in Taipei, on January 13, 2026, Delta, a prominent company specializing in power management and sustainable solutions, received the prestigious double "A List" ranking in both the 2025 "Climate Change" and "Water Security" reports by CDP. Remarkably, this marks the fifth consecutive time Delta has achieved this recognition. This year, Delta stands out amongst the 22,000+ companies that participated, with less than 1% achieving such a notable status in these crucial categories.

data.title: Crypto extortion crimes on the rise in France as armed robbers resort to kidnapping and home invasions to target investors.
data.description: There has been a significant increase in armed robberies aimed at crypto investors, where criminals resort to tactics such as kidnapping and home invasions to steal their digital assets.
